mechanism_narrative: Real GDP level growth signals aggregate demand expansion that translates into higher corporate revenues and earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC of GDPC1 changes remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate above 9 percent signals severe labor market slack that forces the Federal Reserve to maintain extraordinary monetary accommodation, lowering discount rates and supporting a relief rally in the S&P 500 over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of triggered instances when UNRATE exceeds 9.0.

mechanism_narrative: The joint condition of high unemployment and near-zero policy rates signals a prolonged zero-interest-rate policy that suppresses competing fixed-income yields and drives equity risk premium compression, producing positive S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term of UNRATE and FEDFUNDS achieves a Rank IC below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in industrial production predicts positive short-term S&P 500 returns specifically during post-crisis recoveries when high unemployment keeps wage pressures muted and allows margins to expand alongside volume growth.
failure_condition: In periods where UNRATE exceeds 8%, INDPRO changes fail to predict positive 5-day returns with Rank IC above 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 600 thousand units signals a frozen residential construction sector that transmits negative wealth and employment effects to the broader economy, dragging S&P 500 returns lower over the next quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered instances when HOUST is below 600.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous occurrence of rising retail sales and falling industrial production creates a stagflationary supply-demand mismatch that squeezes corporate profit margins and generates negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 1-month change positive while INDPRO 1-month change negative
failure_condition: The interaction term of RSAFS and INDPRO fails to achieve a Rank IC below -0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is pinned near zero, an elevated CPI level indicates accumulating inflation pressure that raises the probability of premature policy tightening, reducing equity valuations over the next week.
regime_hint: zero lower bound with inflation vigilance
failure_condition: In periods with FEDFUNDS below 0.25%, higher CPIAUCSL does not predict negative 5-day returns with Rank IC below -0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in nonfarm payrolls signals expanding household income that drives consumption and corporate revenue growth, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC of PAYEMS changes remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.
